rows.label: tlk43300046_01_msg0002
rows.name:
That means I wash dishes
and peel vegetables.

rows.label: tlk43300046_01_msg0003
rows.name:
Yeah, yeah. I know, okay?
I'm only just starting out.

rows.label: tlk43300046_01_msg0004
rows.name: I was a mercenary till right recently.

rows.label: tlk43300046_01_msg0005
rows.name:
I launch enemies in the air, then
smash them into the ground! That's
my favorite combat combo.

rows.label: tlk43300046_01_msg0006
rows.name:
...Ah, but now, my biggest dream
is to become a cook at the court.

rows.label: tlk43300046_01_msg0007
rows.name:
I want Queen Lagert to eat
food that I made someday!
